      • [ - ] haunani - member since 21-Nov-25

        Bournemouth play with wide tempo and forward runs, looking to create chances from crosses and quick transitions, but they can be open defensively. Aston Villa control possession more, build through midfield and press to win the ball high. The match usually sees Villa dictate rhythm while Bournemouth try to hurt them on the break.
